title: Implement Agent Channel Reader for Named Pipes (cTrader)
description: Extend the agent-channel-reader.ts to support Windows Named Pipes for cTrader communication. The cTrader cBot uses Named Pipes instead of ZeroMQ.

implementation_notes: Use Node.js 'net' module with named pipe paths
Handle pipe doesn't exist (server not running)

task_2_integrate_channel_reader.description: Add Named Pipe support to agent-channel-reader.ts
changes: Create NamedPipeConnection class similar to ZmqBridge
Parse JSON data from pipe stream
Emit 'snapshot' events compatible with ZMQ format

task_3_command_sender.description: Implement command sending via Named Pipe
changes: Connect to command pipe when data pipe connects

acceptance_criteria: Named Pipe client connects to cTrader data pipe
Account data streams to desktop app
Commands sent via command pipe work
